title: Smart Hula Hoop — Slim Your Waist
description: You're watching your favorite show — and already slimming your waist. Just 10 min a day. No gym, no effort.

title: Power Waist Trainer — Sculpt Your Figure
description: You put it on, zip it up — and your silhouette is already transformed. Supports your back, tightens your waist, all day long.

title: Smart Jump Rope — Count Every Victory
description: You jump, it counts. Every rep, every calorie — tracked on the screen. Burn fat anywhere, anytime.

title: Tie-Dye Flex Leggings — Bold & Unstoppable
description: You slip them on — and instantly feel powerful. High-waist hold, buttery feel, 10 bold colors. Made to be seen.

title: Zen Jumpsuit — One Piece, Total Freedom
description: You zip up once — and you're ready for yoga, pilates, or just a beautiful day. Stretchy, breathable, effortlessly chic.

title: AnkleBoost Weights — Train Harder, Burn More
description: You walk, you tone. Clip them on and turn every step into a workout. No gym membership needed.

title: ShockFit Sports Bra — Move With Confidence
description: You move, it holds. Shock-absorbing, breathable, from S to 5XL. Wear it alone — and feel completely supported.

title: ProGuard Knee Pads — Train Hard, Stay Safe
description: You push harder knowing your knees are protected. Lightweight, breathable, barely feel them — until you need them most.

title: InvisiFix Posture Strap — Stand Tall
description: You wear it under your clothes — no one sees it. But everyone notices how you carry yourself. Back pain? Gone.

title: C6S Smart Band — Health on Your Wrist
description: You glance at your wrist — heart rate, oxygen, sleep score. All day, effortlessly. Your body talks. Now you can hear it.

title: AcuRelief Mat — Melt Tension Away
description: You lie down for 20 minutes — and get up feeling like a new person. Stress gone. Muscles loose. Sleep deeper tonight.

title: WarmBelt — Soothe Your Core Daily
description: Cramps hit — you wrap it on, press a button. In minutes, warmth spreads through your belly. Pure relief, instantly.

title: AquaFlow Bottle — Hydrate Anywhere
description: You're losing weight — keep your water right beside you. No need to get up. Leak-proof, 650ml, always within reach.

title: AirStep Runners — Light as Air
description: You lace them up — and your feet barely touch the ground. Ultra-light, breathable, built for women who move fast.

title: AquaPillow — Wake Up Pain-Free
description: After a wonderful day, a little tired — you rest your head on this cloud-soft pillow. Morning comes and your neck feels brand new.

title: J18 AirBuds — Pure Sound Always
description: You hit play — your favorite song kicks in and the calories start flying. Burn fat with music in your ears. Every session becomes a party.
